moduleTitle: NDT Methods Familiarity: Acoustic Emission and Electromagnetic Testing

lessons.title: Acoustic Emission Testing: Fundamentals and Sources
objectives: Explain the principles and theory of acoustic emission testing
Identify sources of acoustic emissions in stressed structures
Describe AE equipment and materials at a familiarity level

lessons.title: Acoustic Emission: Technique Selection, Instrumentation, and Evaluation
objectives: Describe proper selection of AE technique including instrumentation and signal processing
Identify cable types, signal conditioning, signal detection, and noise discrimination considerations
Summarize interpretation and evaluation of AE test results
cp105Topics: 2.1.2 Proper selection of acoustic emission technique
2.1.3 Interpretation and evaluation of test results

lessons.title: Electromagnetic Testing: Sensors, Equipment, and Reference Standards
objectives: Describe ET sensors and basic types of equipment and readout
Explain the role of reference standards in electromagnetic testing
Summarize eddy current principles at a familiarity level
cp105Topics: 2.2.2 Basic types of equipment, types of readout

lessons.title: Electromagnetic Testing: Applications and Interpretation
objectives: Describe ET applications including flaw detection, sorting, thickness gauging, and process control
Interpret representative ET test results at a familiarity level
Match ET applications to appropriate techniques
